chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No.2324 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1.For order on MA No.12559/25 (urgent) 2.For order on MA No.12560/25 (exemption) 3.For hearing of bail application 09.09.2025 Agha Shahzaib, Advocate a/w the applicant ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all exceptions. 3. Applicant Shaturghun son of Bhisham Lal Chawla, is present along with his counsel to seek protective bail to enable him to appear before the trial Court for seeking appropriate relief. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated by complainant in Crime No.31/2025 of PS ANF Clifton, Karachi, under Sections 41 and 42 of CNSA 1997 and Sections 3 and 4 of AMLA 2010 and it is difficult for the applicant to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such he has appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail and apprehends his arrest at the hands of police. Without commenting on the merits / demerits of the case, applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of five days from today to enable him to seek remedy as provided under the law before the relevant Court subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand only) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 13.09.2025 or on approaching the applicant before the relevant Court whichever is earlier. The applicant is cautioned that this concession of protective bail will not be extended for any reason whatsoever and if the applicant fails to surrender before the relevant Court during validity of this protective bail, the bail bond shall stand forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect on 13.09.2025 or on approaching the applicant before the relevant Court whichever is earlier. The applicant is cautioned that this concession of protective bail will not be extended for any reason whatsoever and if the applicant fails to surrender before the relevant Court during validity of this protective bail, the bail bond shall stand forfeited. The criminal bail application is disposed of in the foregoing terms. J U D G E Asif
